attacking_style: Does not initiate attacks but opportunistically bridges to moves on climbs, using drafting advantage to conserve energy rather than forcing the pace.
team_tactics: Operates independently in breakaways, prioritizing energy conservation over cooperative work; willing to let tactical opportunities fail rather than expend effort pulling.
terrain_preference: Climbs where he can bridge using others' slipstream; avoids taking responsibility for chase or pace-setting on any terrain.
vulnerability: Exposed when forced to work cooperatively in breakaways; tactical conservatism leads to caught breakaways when refusing to contribute pulls before finales.
key_patterns: Bridges to attacks using drafting advantage rather than initiating moves himself (2 observations)
Refuses to pull through cooperatively in breakaways, prioritizing energy conservation (2 observations)
Strong enough to follow moves but tactically passive in execution (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: physically strong enough to bridge challenging attacks but tactical approach undermined potential results
